common.tagline: Your Safe Space for Mental Wellness

disclaimer.banner: MindEase is an AI companion, not a substitute for professional therapy.
disclaimer.full: MindEase is not a substitute for professional therapy. If you're in crisis, please contact emergency services.
disclaimer.chat: MindEase is an AI companion and may make mistakes. Not a substitute for professional help.

landing.hero: Your Safe Space for Mental Wellness
landing.subtitle: An AI-powered companion available 24/7 to listen, support, and help you find calm. Private, judgment-free, always here.

support.title: Empathetic Support
support.description: AI companions trained in therapeutic techniques including CBT, mindfulness, and active listening.

privacy.title: Private & Secure
privacy.description: Your conversations are encrypted and never shared. Your mental health journey stays yours.

language.title: Amharic & English
language.description: Chat in your preferred language. MindEase supports both Amharic and English.

v2.disclaimerStrip: MindEase is an AI companion, not a substitute for professional therapy.

hero.headlineLead: A quiet companion for the days that feel
hero.lede: MindEase is a calm space to think things through — gently, in your own time. Reflect, talk, and watch the line settle.

preview.user: I keep replaying that conversation from work.
preview.assistant: What part of it sticks? Sometimes the loop has one quiet line we can name.

items.title: Notice how you feel
items.body: A quick mood check-in — one tap, no story required.

items.title: Talk, in your own words
items.body: Reflect with a calm, private conversation. Your pace, your words.

items.title: Watch the line settle
items.body: A gentle picture of how things shift. No metrics, just you.

items.title: Conversations
items.body: Private, unhurried. Saved if you want them. Forgotten if you don't.

items.title: Mood tracking
items.body: Five honest words instead of ten metrics. A line that listens back.

items.title: Resources
items.body: Short, useful pieces — for the small in-between hours.

items.title: Crisis support
items.body: If it's heavier than us, we route you out — fast.

testimonial.quote: It's the first time something tech-shaped didn't try to fix me. It just sat with me until I could think again.

items.title: End-to-end encrypted
items.body: Conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest.

items.title: You own it
items.body: Export or delete everything, any time. No dark patterns.

items.title: Crisis, one tap away
items.body: Local hotlines surfaced when you need them most.

finalCta.headlineLead: Some days the best thing you can do
finalCta.lede: Free to start, no card required. Your conversations stay yours.
finalCta.disclaimer: MindEase is not a replacement for professional care. If you're in crisis, call or text 988.

footer.tagline: A quieter place to think it through.

v3.disclaimer: MindEase is not a substitute for professional therapy. If you're in crisis, please contact emergency services.

hero.label: Trained in CBT, mindfulness & active listening
hero.headlineLead: A quiet companion for the days that feel
hero.lede: MindEase is a private, judgment-free AI companion built on therapeutic techniques. It listens, helps you find calm, and gently tracks how you're feeling over time — in English or አማርኛ.
hero.chip1Msg: That sounds heavy. Let's slow down.

how.intro: Most people open MindEase for the first time at 11pm, on a phone, after a hard day. The flow is built for that — short, kind, and asks only what helps.

steps.title: Notice how you feel
steps.body: One tap. Five faces. A short note if you want. We track the line, not the moment.

steps.title: Talk, in your own words
steps.body: Type or speak. MindEase listens, reflects back, and offers grounded techniques — never platitudes.

steps.title: Watch the line settle
steps.body: Streaks, gentle nudges, and trends help you see what's working — without turning wellness into a scoreboard.

featuresSection.headline: Built carefully, on purpose.
featuresSection.intro: We made the boring decisions first — encryption, tone, refusal patterns, crisis routing — so the experience can feel quiet and human.

items.title: Empathetic support
items.body: Companions trained in CBT, mindfulness, and active listening. Tone is the product — careful, never clinical-cold.

items.title: Private & secure
items.body: Conversations are encrypted in transit and at rest. We don't sell, share, or train public models on your data. Ever.
Speak in the language you think in. Cultural nuance, idiom, and culturally-grounded resources, not a literal translation.

moments.intro: Late-night spirals. Quiet mornings. The pause before a hard conversation. MindEase meets you in the moments most apps don't notice.

preview.intro: A conversation when you need to be heard, and a quiet log of how the days are going — so you can look back without scrolling through old messages.

chat.label: Chat · MindEase
chat.bot1: How are you feeling today? No pressure to put it neatly.
chat.user1: Honestly? Just stretched thin. Couldn't sleep again.
chat.bot2: That sounds exhausting — physically and mentally. Want to try a two-minute breathing exercise, or would you rather just keep talking?

bilingual.body: Mental health doesn't translate cleanly. MindEase is built natively in English and Amharic — with culturally-grounded resources, idiom, and warmth. Switch any time.

cards.quote: It's okay to not have words for it yet. Stay with the feeling — I'm here.
ለስሜትህ ቃላት ማግኘት ባይቻልም ችግር የለውም። ከእኔ ጋር ቆይ።

testimonials.intro: Early MindEase users from Addis Ababa, London, and Toronto on what's changed in the weeks since they started chatting. Names changed; words theirs.

items.quoteLead: I used it at 3am when I couldn't call anyone. It didn't try to fix me — it just
items.name: Sara M.

items.quoteTrail: changed everything. I didn't have to translate my own grief into someone else's words.
items.name: Daniel T.

items.quoteLead: The mood streaks made me notice patterns my therapist later confirmed. It's not a replacement — it's a
items.name: Priya R.

safety.headlineLead: If it's heavier than us, we route you out —
safety.lede: MindEase is an AI companion, not a substitute for professional therapy or emergency services. We surface real human help the moment a conversation needs it.

resources.name: Find a hotline near you
resources.desc: Verified hotlines in 130+ countries, by region.

resources.name: Crisis banner
resources.desc: Visible at the top of every conversation. Never buried.

finalCta.headlineLead: Some days the best thing you can do
finalCta.lede: Free to start, no card required. Your conversations stay yours.

footer.tagline: A private, judgment-free AI companion for mental wellness. Built carefully, on purpose. Not a substitute for professional therapy.

brand.subcopy: MindEase is built for unhurried reflection — the small in-between hours that need a calmer place to land.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your journey.

brand.subcopy: Pick up where you left off. Your conversations, mood log, and streak are exactly as you left them — encrypted and waiting.
brand.quote: I open it on the bus home. Five minutes, and I can breathe a little easier before I walk through the door.

register.subtitle: Start your mental wellness journey. It takes about 90 seconds.
register.agreeSuffix: , and understand MindEase is not a substitute for professional therapy.

brand.subcopy: Three minutes to set up. No card required. Your conversations, mood log, and notes belong to you — encrypted and never sold.

steps.title: Create an account.
steps.body: Email + password, or continue with Google.

steps.title: Pick a check-in time.
steps.body: One gentle nudge a day, never more. You can turn it off anytime.

steps.title: Talk when you need to.
steps.body: Type or speak. MindEase listens, no scoreboard, no streak shame.

forgot.title: Reset link coming soon
forgot.subtitle: Self-serve password reset is on the way. For now, please contact support@mindease.co for help.

dashboard.context: It's been {days} days since you last checked in — no pressure.
dashboard.contextToday: You checked in today. Take it gently.
dashboard.contextYesterday: You checked in yesterday — welcome back.
dashboard.recentSubtitle: Pick up where you left off.
dashboard.noChats: No conversations yet. Start your first chat!
dashboard.startChatDescLong: Talk to MindEase for emotional support, coping strategies, and a safe space to reflect.
dashboard.noMoodData: No mood logs this week yet.

reflection.prompt: What's one small thing you can let go of today?

resource.title: Three breaths, slowly.
resource.body: A 90-second pause that asks nothing of you. For the moments before you respond.

header.comingSoonBody: This area isn't wired up yet.

v2.streakLine: You're on a {streak}-day check-in streak. No pressure — just here when you need it.
v2.noStreakLine: Welcome back — start with a small check-in.

checkIn.title: How are you feeling right now?
checkIn.subtitle: One tap. No notes required.

startChat.eyebrow: — Pick up where you left off
startChat.body: MindEase is here to listen — emotional support, coping strategies, and a safe space to reflect. Free, anytime.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.comingSoonBody: This action isn't wired up yet.

prompts: You don't have to feel ready. You just have to begin.
Rest is not the reward for finishing — it's the bridge that lets you continue.
What you're carrying matters, even if no one else can see it.
Slow is a pace, not a failure.
You can love your life and still find some of its hours hard.
Listening to yourself is a quiet kind of courage.
Some days, the bravest thing is to keep being honest.
You don't have to translate yourself to be understood by someone who cares.
Pay attention to what makes you feel like a person, and do that more.

chat.welcomeSubtitle: I'm here to listen, support, and help you find calm.

thread.renameDescription: Give this conversation a clearer title.
thread.shareFailed: Couldn't share — try copying the URL.

composer.placeholder: Message MindEase…  No pressure to put it neatly.

empty.sub: I'm here to listen, support, and help you find calm. Take your time — pick a starter or just begin in your own words.

anxious.title: I've been feeling anxious lately
anxious.sub: We'll figure out what's driving it, gently.

talk.title: I just want someone to talk to

breathing.title: Guide me through a breathing exercise
breathing.sub: Two minutes. I'll set the pace.

If you're in crisis, please reach out for help

assessments.title: Self-Assessments
assessments.subtitle: Quick, clinically-based tools to check in with yourself
assessments.disclaimer: These are screening tools, not clinical diagnoses. Please consult a professional for clinical evaluation.
assessments.question: Question {current} of {total}
assessments.noHistory: Take your first assessment to start tracking
assessments.crisisNotice: If you're having thoughts of self-harm, please know that help is available.
assessments.notDiagnosis: This is a screening tool, not a clinical diagnosis.
assessments.improvement: Your score has improved since last time!
assessments.headline: Where are you, this week?
assessments.subtitleLong: Brief, validated questionnaires used in clinics worldwide. Not a diagnosis — a snapshot. We track the line, so you can talk to your future self with kindness.

safety.lead: These are screening tools, not a diagnosis.
safety.body: Use them to notice patterns and bring something concrete to a clinician — never as a verdict on a hard day. If something feels heavy, crisis resources are always one tap away.

historyPanel.title: Your history
historyPanel.noHistory: Your line starts after the first check-in.
historyPanel.noDataHint: Take your first to start the line.

take.preambleDefault: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by…
take.preamblePss: In the last month, how often have you felt…
take.subhint: Choose the answer closest to how it's been. There's no right answer — just what's true.

result.headline: Here's where you are this week.
result.joinGroup: Find a circle that gets it
result.ifHeavyBody: You don't have to wait for a number to ask for help. These are free, confidential, and run by trained humans.
result.notDiagnosis: This isn't a diagnosis. It's a brief screen that helps you notice what's heavy and bring it somewhere useful. Save the result and share it with a clinician if that feels right.

toasts.pdfSoonBody: We'll let you know when it lands.
toasts.shareSoonBody: We'll let you know when this is ready.

crisis.headline: Thank you for being honest with us.
crisis.body: It takes courage to mark that answer. You're not alone in this — and you don't have to wait until you finish the check-in to talk to a real person. These resources are free, confidential, and run by trained humans.

list.reminderSoonBody: We'll let you know when this lands.

memory.title: Your memory
memory.subtitle: Everything MindEase remembers about you across chat and voice. Delete anything you'd rather it forget.
memory.deletedAll: Deleted {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}.

memory.confirmDeleteAllBody: This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}. The AI will no longer remember anything you've told it. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: Nothing to remember yet

viewer.holdMic: Hold the mic, or press and hold Space

alex.name: Bereket
alex.intro: Hey, I'm Bereket. What's been on your mind today? I'd love to hear about it.

sora.name: Saba
sora.intro: Hi, I'm Saba. There's no rush here — start anywhere that feels right.

ashenafi.name: Ashenafi
ashenafi.intro: Hello, I'm Ashenafi. Whatever you're carrying, you don't have to carry it alone.

bedru.name: Bedru
bedru.intro: Hi, I'm Bedru. There's no wrong way to start — just say what's on your heart.

tigist.name: Tigist
tigist.intro: Hi, I'm Tigist. Whatever brought you here today, I'm glad you came. Let's talk.

guest.banner: You're in guest mode. Create an account to save your data.
guest.disclaimer: Welcome! You can chat with MindEase without an account. Your data will not be saved when you leave. Create an account anytime to save your progress.
guest.upgradeSuccess: Account created! Your data has been saved.
guest.featureRequiresAccount: Create an account to use this feature

export.title: Export Your Data
export.subtitle: Download your MindEase data for personal backup or to share with a healthcare professional.
export.privacyNotice: Exports are generated on-demand and are not stored on our servers. Only you can initiate an export.
export.moodDesc: Download your mood entries, notes, and statistics
export.assessmentDesc: Download your self-assessment history and scores
export.exportAllDesc: Download all your data in one PDF
export.disclaimer: Exported data is for personal use. MindEase is not a clinical tool.
